content: Povero Pinocchio! Cercò anche di strapparsi i capelli, ma dato che erano solamente dipinti sulla sua testa di legno, non riusciva nemmeno a tirarli.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Guybrush88 (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:Poor Pinocchio! He even tried to tear his hair, but as it was only painted on his wooden head, he could not even pull it
